sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِشِرَاءِ بَعْضِ الدَّوَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je otišao u apoteku da kupi neki lijek.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmad went to the pharmacy to buy some medicine.

sentences.arabic: شَرَحَ الصَّيْدَلِيُّ كَيْفِيَّةَ اسْتِخْدَامِ العِلَاجِ بِشَكْلٍ صَحِيحٍ.
sentences.translation: Apotekar je objasnio kako se pravilno koristi terapija.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist explained how to use the treatment correctly.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ اتِّبَاعُ تَعْلِيمَاتِ الطَّبِيبِ بِدِقَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je precizno slijediti ljekarska uputstva.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to follow the doctor's instructions accurately.
